title: QR Code Payment Scam
description: A stranger claimed they needed to send me money and asked me to scan a QR code. After scanning it, ₹9,500 was deducted from my bank account instead of being credited.

title: Fake Electricity Bill Scam
description: I received an SMS stating that my electricity connection would be disconnected unless I paid an overdue bill immediately. The message contained a fraudulent payment link. After making the payment, I discovered the electricity department had not sent the message.

title: Fraudulent Charity Donation Request
description: I received a social media message requesting donations for flood relief. The campaign appeared genuine, but after donating ₹15,000 I learned the charity organization did not exist.

title: Job Offer Registration Scam
description: A company offered me a work-from-home position but requested a registration fee of ₹4,500 before issuing the appointment letter. After payment, all contact details became inactive.

title: Fake Customer Care Refund Scam
description: I searched online for customer care of an e-commerce website and called the first number that appeared. The representative convinced me to install a remote access application to process a refund. Money was transferred from my account without authorization.

title: Matrimonial Profile Fraud
description: I met someone through a matrimonial website who claimed to be working abroad. After several conversations they requested financial assistance for an emergency. I transferred ₹55,000 before realizing the profile was fake.
